title: Without Me
why_this_song: Without Me by Halsey (2018) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 14 times; first heard in: "You know I'm the one who put you up there"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Tell me how's it feel sittin' up there?"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Thinking you could live without me"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "Thinking you could live without me"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I don't know why (yeah, I don't know why)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "know" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "know" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: Found you when your heart was broke
Thinking you could live without me

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Halsey one question about "Without Me", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Halsey sobre "Without Me", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Without Me" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Without Me" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Without Me" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Without Me" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
